description_long: This is a dark glass wine bottle with a classic, elongated shape and a gently sloping shoulder. The bottle features a gold-colored foil or capsule covering the neck and closure, giving it a refined appearance. A rectangular cream-colored label with decorative red and brown accents is affixed to the front, displaying text and possibly a logo, though the details are partially obscured. The glass is tinted a deep burgundy, suggesting it contains red wine, and the bottle's surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light. The neck is long and slender, tapering slightly toward the top, and the closure appears to be a cork beneath the foil. The base of the bottle is not fully visible, so the punt design cannot be determined.
description: A dark glass wine bottle with a gold foil-covered neck, cream label, and a smooth, glossy surface. The bottle has a classic, elegant shape and contains red wine.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cream-colored label with decorative accents and the gold foil on the neck.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still showing most of the label and the bottle's curvature.
description_view_2: Side view with the label barely visible, highlighting the bottle's dark glass and slender profile.
description_view_3: Rear view with no label visible, showing the uninterrupted dark glass surface and the gold foil at the top.
attribute_label_or_branding: A rectangular cream-colored label with red and brown decorative elements is placed on the front of the bottle. The label covers a significant portion of the lower half of the bottle's body and contains some text, though it is not fully legible. No prominent logos or symbols are clearly visible.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: Long, slender, and gently tapered neck with a straight profile and a gold foil covering.
